content.name: Route
content.summary: Route main entry — classify user intent and route to matching AIAP package.
content.description: AISIP V1: flow graph visible + function on-demand loading.

match.step1: Match user intent to the best AIAP package from [Available AIAP packages]
match.context_rule: If conversation context shows an active AIAP package, ambiguous or follow-up messages (e.g. 'done?', 'next', 'go on') MUST stay routed to the same package. Only switch when user expresses a clearly different intent.
match.no_match: Inform user that no matching AIAP package exists and suggest adding one
match.uncertain: If not sure which package to use, route to classify branch

classify.step1: Read and execute intent_classifier_aiap/main.aisop.json using file_system tool
classify.step2: Use classification result to determine the correct AIAP package

execute.step1: Read the matched AIAP package entry file using file_system tool
execute.step2: Parse and run the loaded AISOP/AISIP blueprint, return result to user
execute.constraints: Never fabricate responses without running the routed AIAP package.
